description: Actual Q1 2026 observed macro values for Iran war calibration case
event: Iran war onset and Strait of Hormuz closure

observed_values.em_bonds_performance: worst performing fixed income segment Q1 2026

portfolio_impact_observed.equities_impact: negative - Asia equity selloff consistent with historical risk-off patterns
portfolio_impact_observed.fixed_income_impact: negative - yield curve steepening hurt duration exposure
portfolio_impact_observed.alternatives_impact: mixed - commodity-linked alternatives positive, PE marks under pressure
portfolio_impact_observed.structured_products_impact: negative - credit spread widening compressed structured product values
portfolio_impact_observed.private_credit_impact: negative - CCC cohort stress accelerating, downgrade ratio elevated
portfolio_impact_observed.cash_impact: neutral to positive - safe haven demand supported money market rates

calibration_use: Compare modeled distribution outputs from scenario_stress_model.py against these observed values to validate that actual outcomes fell within the modeled probability distribution. Document findings in outputs/calibration_report.md.
